column1: # - One row per gold section.  Rows sharing query_id form one question.
# - category: SIMILARITY | RELATIONAL | BOUNDARY  (uppercase)
# - gold_canonical_id: verbatim value from the page's frontmatter canonical_id field.
# - gold_heading_path: '>'-separated section breadcrumb matching actual headings in the page.
#   Use the first heading level that uniquely identifies the section (H2 or H3).
# - notes: origin tag or boundary rationale.  No commas — use semicolons if needed.
# - Lines beginning with '#' are comments and are skipped by BundleCorpusLoader.
# - Loader parses with split("
column2:
, -1) — fields MUST NOT contain commas.

# >=8 RELATIONAL (multi-hop) and >=6 BOUNDARY (straddles chunk boundary) questions.
